title: Philips Avent Natural Response Glass Baby Bottles 8oz/240 ml with Medium Flow Teats (Flow 3), 2 Pack, SCY933/02
features: Works like breast¹: the teat releases milk when your baby drinks, which is different from the traditional free-flow teats; as with breastfeeding, it can take time for baby to get used to this

Works like the breast: The teat releases milk when baby actively drinks, this is different from the traditional free-flow teats. As with breastfeeding, it can take time for a baby to get used to this.
The unique Natural Response teat opening only releases milk when the baby actively drinks, when pausing to swallow and breathe, no milk flows; the no-drip teat design prevents spills and lost milk
Right teat flow: find your baby's perfect flow rate and personalise your Avent bottle; age is a guide, but your baby's approach will help determine when to move to a higher or lower teat flow rate
Anti-colic valve for your and your baby's well-being: it keeps air away from your baby's tummy during feeding to reduce colic and discomfort
Easy to clean: the wide bottleneck makes filling and cleaning effortless; only a few parts for quick and simple assembly
The set includes: 2x 8oz Natural Response glass baby bottles with medium flow teats (Flow 3)
description: The Philips Avent Natural Response nipple only releases milk when the baby actively drinks. Babies can therefore drink, swallow, and breathe using their natural rhythm, like on the breast – making it easy to combine breast and bottle-feeding. This bottle has a unique nipple opening which only releases milk when the baby actively drinks – so when they pause to swallow and breathe, the milk pauses too. The wide, soft, and flexible nipple of the Avent bottle is designed to mimic the shape and feel of a breast, helping the baby to latch on and feed comfortably. Additionally, the anti-colic bottle value is designed to keep air away from your baby’s tummy during feeding, to help reduce colic and discomfort. The ergonomic Philips Avent baby bottle is easy to grip at any angle to give maximum comfort during feeding – easy for both your hands, and tiny hands, to hold! Every baby feeds differently, and develops at their own pace. We’ve designed a range of flow rates so you can find the perfect one for your baby and personalise your Philips Avent baby bottle. Made of premium quality borosilicate glass, the Philips Avent glass bottle is heat and thermal shock resistant. It can therefore be safely stored in the fridge, warmed, and is also suitable for sterilisation. The nipple opening is designed to release milk only when the baby is feeding, so you can confidently avoid milk loss, whether at home or on the go. The wide baby bottle neck makes filling and cleaning easy, and there are only a few parts for quick and easy assembly. Philips Avent Natural bottles and nipples are made of BPA free* materials. Our new Natural Response Philips Avent bottles are different from free-flow baby bottles. Just like breastfeeding, it could take a few tries to get it right. That's perfectly natural. Includes: 2 Baby Bottles 8oz/240ml *0% BPA, following EU regulation 10/2011
